title: Domain Registration with Premium TLD Fee Calculation
description: Verify that users can register a domain using the IPPAN naming convention with correct premium TLD fee calculation and payment completion.

steps.description: Navigate to domain registration page in React UI
Input valid domain name using 'ipn.domain.tld' convention with a premium TLD
System displays 20-year sliding fee schedule with premium multipliers applied
Complete payment within the UI
Domain is successfully registered and ownership proof can be verified

title: Domain Registration with Invalid TLD
description: Verify that registration fails when a domain with an invalid or unsupported TLD is submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to domain registration page
Enter domain name with unsupported TLD
Attempt to submit registration
System rejects registration with an appropriate error message about unsupported TLD

title: Wallet Creation and Management
description: Ensure users can generate, import, and manage multiple cryptographic wallets including local, watch-only, and hardware wallets.

steps.description: Open wallet management page in React UI
Create new local wallet and verify key pair generation
Add a watch-only wallet by importing public address
Connect a hardware wallet and verify connection
Wallet list correctly displays all wallet types with their statuses

title: Staking Validators and Rewards Distribution
description: Validate staking process including validator registration, delegation, slashing, and proper rewards calculation and distribution.

steps.description: Register new validator by staking IPN tokens
Delegate stake from a non-validator wallet to validator
Simulate slashing event due to misbehavior
Compute and distribute staking rewards to validator and delegators
Validator registration and delegation succeed, slashing updates balances correctly, and rewards are properly distributed

title: Block Size Enforcement and Block Error
description: Verify that blocks larger than 32 KB are rejected with the BlockError::TooLarge error and proper logging.

steps.description: Submit block with size exactly 32 KB
Block accepted and processed successfully
Submit block with size exceeding 32 KB
Block rejected with BlockError::TooLarge error and proper error propagation

title: ZK-STARK Per-Round Proof Generation
description: Ensure ZK-STARK proofs are generated once per consensus round and correctly attached to round information, not per block.

steps.description: Trigger a full consensus round with multiple blocks
Verify exactly one ZK-STARK proof generated per round
Each block in round references the single round proof

title: HashTimer Encoding and Digest Compliance
description: Validate that HashTimer encoding and digest computation conform to v1 canonical specification with valid field values.

steps.description: Create transactions with valid and invalid HashTimer fields
Valid transactions have correct encoded HashTimer and digest per spec
Invalid HashTimer fields cause transaction rejection with validation errors

title: IPPAN Time Synchronization Accuracy and Fault Tolerance
description: Verify IPPAN Time system ensures latency compensation, monotonic timestamps, drift policy, and Byzantine fault tolerance with validator quorum.

steps.description: Simulate multiple validators sending timestamp samples with network latency
System computes consensus timestamp with latency compensation and monotonic increase
Inject outlier timestamps
MAD filtering correctly excludes outliers from consensus calculation
Simulate up to f Byzantine faulty validator timestamps
Consensus timestamp remains stable and consistent with 2f+1 quorum

title: Storage System Sharding, Encryption and Proof-of-Storage
description: Test encrypted storage with shard creation, distribution, auto-balancing, and proof-of-storage validation for data availability.

steps.description: Upload encrypted file and initiate sharding
File shards are distributed across storage nodes with replication
Trigger proof-of-storage challenge for stored shards
Storage nodes respond with valid proofs confirming availability
Simulate node failure and verify auto rebalancing of shards
Shards successfully replicated to maintain availability

title: AI/ML Marketplace End-to-End Job Lifecycle
description: Verify user can register models and datasets, submit inference jobs with bidding, receive proof-of-computation, and distribute royalties.

steps.description: Register AI model and dataset in marketplace registries
Submit inference job requesting bids from compute providers
Bids are correctly collected and best bid selected
Provider processes job providing cryptographic proof-of-computation
Proof is validated and job marked complete
Automated royalty payments are triggered and transaction logged

title: Cross-Chain Bridge Asset Transfer and State Synchronization
description: Confirm cross-chain asset transfers correctly map assets, relay transactions, and synchronize state across blockchains.

steps.description: Initiate asset transfer from IPPAN chain to external blockchain using bridge
Asset mapping translates IPN tokens correctly to target chain representation
Relay network sends transaction anchoring to L2 chain
State synchronization occurs successfully and transaction finalized on both chains
Simulate network failure or message loss
Bridge retries and reconciles state without asset loss or duplication

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Signature Validation
description: Validate all post-quantum algorithms (CRYSTALS-Kyber, Dilithium, SPHINCS+) perform correctly for transaction signing and verification.

steps.description: Generate keys and sign transactions using each post-quantum cryptographic algorithm
Verify that signatures are correctly validated by the network
Submit transaction with invalid post-quantum signature
System rejects transaction with signature validation failure

title: Security Audit and Threat Detection Logging and Alerts
description: Ensure all suspicious activities and access events generate audit logs and trigger configured threat detection alerts.

steps.description: Simulate unauthorized access and anomaly events
Audit log contains detailed entries of security events
Threat detection system raises alerts and notifications in real-time

title: RESTful API Authentication, Rate Limiting and Validation
description: Test REST API endpoints for correct authentication, enforce rate limiting, validate input parameters, and handle errors gracefully.

steps.description: Send authenticated request with valid parameters to API endpoint
Request processed successfully and valid response returned
Send unauthenticated request
Request rejected with authentication error
Send requests exceeding rate limit threshold
Excess requests rejected with rate limit error
Send request with invalid parameters
API responds with appropriate validation error messages

title: React UI Responsiveness and Performance
description: Verify all user-facing React UI components are responsive, load efficiently, and maintain usability across device types.

steps.description: Open various UI pages (wallet, staking, domains, AI/ML marketplace, explorer) on desktop and mobile browsers
Pages render correctly without layout breaks on different screen sizes
UI performance remains within acceptable load times and interactions are smooth

title: Node Configuration Hot-Reload and Validation
description: Test node configuration manager supports hot-reloading of valid config updates and rejects invalid configurations with errors.

steps.description: Apply valid configuration updates while node is running
Node hot-reloads configuration without restarting
Apply invalid configuration with schema violations
Configuration manager rejects invalid config with detailed errors and does not apply changes

title: Monitoring Dashboard Metrics and Alerts Validation
description: Validate real-time metrics collection, dashboard visualization, and alert notifications for system health and performance.

steps.description: Inject synthetic performance data and faults
Dashboard metrics update in real time reflecting injected data
Alerts and notifications are generated and presented per configured thresholds

title: Transaction Types Submission and Deterministic Ordering
description: Test submission of different transaction types (payments, storage ops, domain updates, AI jobs) are accepted and ordered deterministically via HashTimer.

steps.description: Submit payment transaction
Submit storage operation transaction
Submit domain update transaction
Submit AI model registration and job submission transactions
All transactions accepted and ordered correctly according to HashTimer deterministic timestamps

title: Validator Selection Using Verifiable Randomness
description: Validate that validators are selected fairly for block proposal and voting using verifiable randomness mechanisms.

steps.description: Trigger multiple consensus epochs with validator participation
Validator selection matches expected randomness distribution
Attempt to manipulate randomness input
Verification prevents manipulation and ensures fairness in validator selection

title: Blockchain Explorer Data Integrity and UI Interaction
description: Ensure blockchain explorer UI displays consistent and accurate data for blocks, transactions, accounts, validators, and contracts with interactive controls.

steps.description: Access live blocks, transactions, accounts, and validators pages
Displayed data matches backend state and is updated in near real-time
Use filters and search functionalities on explorer pages
Filtering and search results are accurate and performant
